reviews.author: Liam R. Howlett
reviews.summary: No specific technical concerns were raised, but no explicit approval was given either.

2026-05-21.patch_summary: This patch series aims to deduplicate the implementation of unlock_list_lru() in the mm/list_lru.c file, which is currently duplicated for MEMCG and non-MEMCG variants. The patch consolidates this function into a common implementation.
